arguments.query: list_threads read_thread set_thread_title archive Codex thread sidebar automation run

tools.description: Tools provided by the Codex app.
tools.name: codex_app

tools.description: Create, update, view, or delete recurring automations in the Codex app. Use this when the user asks for a scheduled task, automation, recurring run, repeated task, reminder, follow-up, monitor, or asks you to watch something, keep an eye on it, check back later, wake up later, notify them, or keep working later. Cron automations run as standalone jobs against workspaces. Heartbeat automations are proactive follow-ups attached to the current local thread. Prefer heartbeats for requests to continue this thread later, especially below one hour. Use suggested_create or suggested_update when proposing a worktree automation with a local environment setup config so the user can review it before it is saved. Never write raw automation directives by hand, show raw RRULE strings to the user, or create a workaround cron automation for a thread heartbeat unless the user explicitly asks for that. For requests about existing automations, inspect $CODEX_HOME/automations/*/automation.toml to find matching automation ids by name or prompt. Prefer updating an existing automation over creating a duplicate. For updates, preserve existing fields unless the user asks to change them, and call automation_update with the resolved id and full updated fields.
tools.name: automation_update

tools.description: Read recent status and turn summaries for one Codex thread without opening it. Use page cursors from earlier responses to read older turns.
tools.name: read_thread

hostId.description: Optional host id returned by list_threads.

includeOutputs.description: Whether to include truncated tool or command outputs.

maxOutputCharsPerItem.description: Maximum output characters to keep for each included output item.

turnLimit.description: Maximum number of turns to return.

tools.description: Archive or unarchive a Codex thread in the background.
tools.name: set_thread_archived

archived.description: Whether the thread should be archived.

threadId.description: Thread id to archive or unarchive. Omit to target the calling thread.

tools.description: Rename a Codex thread in the background.
tools.name: set_thread_title

tools.description: List recent Codex threads across the local host and connected remote hosts. Use an optional query to find a specific thread before reading or steering it.
tools.name: list_threads

limit.description: Maximum number of thread summaries to return.

tools.description: Send a follow-up prompt to an existing Codex thread in the background. Omit model and thinking to keep the thread's current settings.
tools.name: send_message_to_thread

hostId.description: Optional host id returned by list_threads.

model.description: Optional model override. Models and supported reasoning efforts on the calling host: gpt-5.5 (Frontier model for complex coding, research, and real-world work.; supported reasoning efforts: low, medium, high, xhigh), gpt-5.4 (Strong model for everyday coding.; supported reasoning efforts: low, medium, high, xhigh), gpt-5.4-mini (Small, fast, and cost-efficient model for simpler coding tasks.; supported reasoning efforts: low, medium, high, xhigh), gpt-5.3-codex-spark (Ultra-fast coding model.; supported reasoning efforts: low, medium, high, xhigh). A different destination host's combinations are validated when the tool runs. You may supply a newer model id when explicitly requested, but omit thinking unless its supported reasoning efforts are listed here.

thinking.description: Optional reasoning effort override. Must be supported by the selected model.

tools.description: Fork a Codex thread. Omit threadId to fork the calling thread, or pass a threadId to fork that specific thread. A same-directory fork returns a child threadId immediately; a worktree fork returns only a pendingWorktreeId until worktree setup creates the child. Forks contain completed history only: if the source thread is running, the active turn and unfinished response are not copied. Send a follow-up message to the child only if the task requires work to continue there.
tools.name: fork_thread

environment.description: Where the fork should run. Omit for a same-directory fork.

threadId.description: Optional source thread id to fork. Omit to fork the calling thread.

tools.description: Move another Codex thread and its associated git state between its checkout and Codex worktree on its current host. Running threads are interrupted before handoff. Omit destinationHostId for this current-host toggle. The calling thread cannot move itself, and cloud handoff is not supported. You can also choose another host to move the thread to a matching saved-project worktree. Returns quickly with an operationId and revision. The UI continues to show live progress in the original handoff item. For model-visible completion, call get_handoff_status with afterRevision and a [REDACTED_PHONE] waitMs, then back off if the revision does not change.
tools.name: handoff_thread

destinationHostId.description: Optional host that should run the thread after handoff. Omit to move between the source thread's checkout and Codex worktree on its current host. Choose another host to move to a matching saved-project worktree. Available hosts: Local (local).

followUpPrompt.description: Optional prompt to send to the destination thread after handoff succeeds.

threadId.description: Other thread id to hand off.

tools.description: Create a separate Codex thread only when the user explicitly asks for a new or background thread. Use list_projects first, then pass its projectId for repo-scoped work in any local or remote project. Use projectless targets for general tasks. Project targets must choose a local or worktree environment.
tools.name: create_thread

model.description: Do not specify a model unless the user explicitly requests a specific model. Otherwise omit this field so the new thread uses the user's configured default model. Models and supported reasoning efforts on the calling host: gpt-5.5 (Frontier model for complex coding, research, and real-world work.; supported reasoning efforts: low, medium, high, xhigh), gpt-5.4 (Strong model for everyday coding.; supported reasoning efforts: low, medium, high, xhigh), gpt-5.4-mini (Small, fast, and cost-efficient model for simpler coding tasks.; supported reasoning efforts: low, medium, high, xhigh), gpt-5.3-codex-spark (Ultra-fast coding model.; supported reasoning efforts: low, medium, high, xhigh). A different destination host's combinations are validated when the tool runs. You may supply a newer model id when explicitly requested, but omit thinking unless its supported reasoning efforts are listed here.

prompt.description: Initial prompt for the new thread.

startingState.description: Only specify this when the user explicitly asks to start from a particular existing git state. Use working-tree to include the current checkout and uncommitted changes. Use branch only for a branch or ref that already exists. Otherwise omit this field so the worktree starts from the project's default branch. Do not use this to name a new branch.

environment.description: Where the project thread should run: directly in the saved project or in a new worktree.

thinking.description: Optional reasoning effort override. Must be supported by the selected model.

tools.description:
Use `js` to run JavaScript in the persistent Node-backed kernel. When a skill or prompt says to use `node_repl`, call this server's `js` execution tool. Calls default to a 30000 ms (30 seconds) timeout when `timeout_ms` is omitted. The runtime exposes `nodeRepl.cwd`, `nodeRepl.homeDir`, `nodeRepl.tmpDir`, `nodeRepl.requestMeta`, `nodeRepl.setResponseMeta(...)`, and `await nodeRepl.emitImage(...)`. Top-level bindings persist across `js` calls until `js_reset`; do not redeclare existing `const` or `let` names. Reuse existing bindings, use top-level `var` for reusable state that may be assigned again, or choose a fresh descriptive name. Use `js_add_node_module_dir` before `js` when a skill provides an extra package directory, and use dynamic imports like `await import("playwright")` rather than filesystem paths under `./node_modules`.

Use Cases:
- Control the in-app browser in conjunction with the Browser Plugin.
- Control the Chrome browser in conjunction with the Chrome Plugin. Prefer this method of controlling Chrome over alternatives (such as Computer Use) unless the user explicitly mentions an alternative.
tools.name: mcp__node_repl

tools.description: Run JavaScript in a persistent Node-backed kernel with top-level await. This is the JavaScript execution tool for the `node_repl` MCP server; use it whenever instructions say to use `node_repl`, the Node REPL MCP, or run Node REPL code. If `timeout_ms` is omitted, execution times out after 30000 ms (30 seconds); pass a larger `timeout_ms` for slow browser automation or other long-running operations. Use `nodeRepl.cwd`, `nodeRepl.homeDir`, and `nodeRepl.tmpDir` to inspect host paths. Use `nodeRepl.requestMeta` to inspect the current MCP request `_meta` object during a tool call. Use `nodeRepl.setResponseMeta(meta)` to attach top-level MCP result `_meta`; repeated calls shallow-merge object keys for the current tool call. Use `nodeRepl.write(text)` when you want exact text output in the tool result; it writes the string exactly as given and does not append a newline. Prefer it over `console.log(...)` for final output, JSON, or other text you plan to consume programmatically. `console.log(...)` is still useful for ad hoc debugging or object inspection because it formats values and appends line breaks automatically. Use `await nodeRepl.emitImage(imageLike)` to return images; each call adds one image to the outer tool result, so call it multiple times to emit multiple images. Supported image inputs are a data URL, inferred PNG/JPEG/WebP bytes, or `{ bytes, mimeType }`. Saved references to `nodeRepl.write(...)` and `nodeRepl.emitImage(...)` stay reusable across calls, but async callbacks that fire after a call finishes still fail because no exec is active. Top-level bindings persist across calls until `js_reset`. If a call throws, prior bindings remain available and bindings that finished initializing before the throw often remain reusable. For reusable names that may be assigned again later, prefer top-level `var name = ...`; `var` can be redeclared across calls. If you hit `SyntaxError: Identifier 'x' has already been declared`, reuse the existing binding if possible, reassign it only if it was declared with `let` or `var`, or pick a new name instead of resetting immediately; a previous `const x` cannot be changed into `var x`. Use a short `{ ... }` block only for temporary scratch names, and do not wrap an entire call in block scope if you want those names reusable later. Use dynamic imports like `await import("playwright")`, `await import("pkg")`, or `await import("./file.js")`; top-level static `import` is not supported. Import packages by package name after installing them into a directory added with `js_add_node_module_dir`, `NODE_REPL_NODE_MODULE_DIRS`, or the working directory. Do not import package entrypoints by filesystem path such as `./node_modules/playwright/index.mjs`. Imported local files must be ESM `.js` or `.mjs` files and run in the context chosen at their dynamic-import boundary, so they can also use `nodeRepl.*`, the captured `console`, and `import.meta` helpers. Bare package imports always resolve from the REPL-wide search roots (`NODE_REPL_NODE_MODULE_DIRS`, then directories later added with `js_add_node_module_dir`, then cwd), not relative to the imported file's location. Imported local files may statically import other local `.js` / `.mjs` files, available packages, and allowed Node builtins. `import.meta.resolve()` returns importable strings such as `fil[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] bare package names, and `node:...` specifiers. Local file modules reload between execs. `node:` builtins are generally available via dynamic import, but `process` / `node:process` remains blocked for now because the current Rust-server-to-Node-child transport runs over stdio and raw process streams can corrupt it. Prefer `nodeRepl.write(text)` for text output and `nodeRepl.emitImage(...)` for images.
tools.name: js

code.description: JavaScript source to execute in the persistent Node-backed kernel. The code runs with top-level await and can use the `nodeRepl` helpers. Examples: `nodeRepl.write(nodeRepl.cwd)`, `const { chromium } = await import("playwright")`, or `await nodeRepl.emitImage(pngBuffer)`.

timeout_ms.description: Optional execution timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000 (30 seconds) when omitted.

title.description: Short user-facing description of what this code block is doing. Use a few words, for example `Inspect package metadata` or `Render chart preview`.

# 根因
- 最新失败发生在 DWS discovery/jsonrpc 阶段，错误类型为网络超时或请求超时。
- Codex automation 的工作目录曾漂移到错误目录，导致运行环境不稳定。
- manual_only 项目群被跳过主动扫描后，没有从历史 manifest 重建输出，导致当前包缺少群目录。
- 冷存储中存在旧版 files/MMDD 布局，与当前 files/MM 规则不一致。

# 已修复
- DWS CLI 调用统一带 timeout=120 秒。
- transient timeout、dial tcp、request_timeout、connection reset 等错误最多重试 3 次，基础 backoff 5 秒。
- automation 工作目录固定为本项目目录。
- manual_only 群仍跳过主动 DWS 扫描，但会从历史 manifest/messages 重建当前 DWS_Outputs.zip 的群目录。
- 冷存储旧 files/MMDD 已自动迁移到 files/MM，并同步更新 SQLite 冷路径。
- 已清理冷存储 .DS_Store。
- README、SKILL.md、开发记录、功能清单、模型参数、Notion 同步脚本均已更新。

# 验证证据
- dws doctor：登录正常，网络可达，cache OK；仅提示 DWS v1.0.46 可升级到 v1.0.49。
- py_compile：主归档脚本、Notion 同步脚本、结构验证脚本、weekly smoke 均通过。
- shell lint：run_daily.sh 和 run_weekly.sh 通过。
- plist lint：daily/weekly plist 均通过；仍保持 disabled/deprecated 语义，不作为无人值守入口。
- 真实运行：manual-repair-validation-2 成功完成。
- 结构验证：9 个群目录全部通过，files/MM 下直接放文件，manifest/missing/status/chat_records 等质量证据存在，无每群 latest.zip。
- 当前包只包含热窗口数据；冷存储不进入当前 DWS_Outputs.zip。

# 风险与后续
- DWS 网络仍偏慢，doctor 延迟约 5 秒；已用 timeout/retry 缓解，但长期建议择机升级 DWS 到 v1.0.49。
- missing 资源 94 个不是本轮新增崩溃，需后续按 exhausted/backoff 规则人工补扫或确认不可下载。
- 自动化按用户当前配置在 11:00 和 19:00 触发；每次目标群增删改后必须同步更新 automation 和 Notion 记录。

- `scripts/archive_dingtalk_all_files.py` 增加 heartbeat 输出和 `reports/current_run_heartbeat.json`。

- hot_cutoff_source：`summary_json`。

结论：最近几次 automation “容易报错”不是主归档链路反复坏，而是 4 个边缘问题叠加，导致自动化线程经常以“未完全完成 / 待处理 / 验证失败”收尾。

**主要根因**
1. **60 天热/冷验证使用了“验证时刻”，不是“打包运行时刻”**  
   最新包在 `[REDACTED_PHONE]:14` 生成，`hot_cutoff_time=[REDACTED_PHONE]:14:05`。但我在 `13:54` 再跑验证时，验证器用当前时间重新算 cutoff，导致 `付款请示群` 一条 `[REDACTED_PHONE]:47:46` 的合法热数据被误判为 cold row。  
   证据：包内 manifest 该行实际是 `storage_tier=hot`，不是数据进错层。

2. **山东日照从 4 月 1 日起扫，历史窗口太大**  
   automation 线程里显示它一度跑到 1 小时以上，被判断为“卡住”。实际是长历史群扫描/下载，没有足够的进度心跳，所以看起来像报错或无响应。

3. **Notion 同步在 automation 里缺 token，反复 pending**  
   `logs/notion_skill_backup.log` 连续返回 `missing_notion_token_pending_written`。这不是归档失败，但 automation 把它作为剩余 blocker，所以每次看起来“不完整”。

4. **automation 配置发生漂移**  
   现在 `dws/automation.toml` 是每天 `11:00` 和 `19:00` 跑，而不是规则里的 `17:00`。同时验证命令仍硬编码 6 个老群，但配置已经有 9 个群，导致验收覆盖不一致。

- 确认最新主链路 run `20260707T131405` 本身成功：9 个群 cursor 均为 `DWS hasMore=false`。
- 复跑全 9 群验证，当前 `ok=false` 的直接原因是上述 60 天边界误判。
- 确认当前无正在运行的 DWS 归档进程。

- [handoff]([REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] [daily_summary.json]([REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] [automation.toml]([REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] [automation memory]([REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] 我这轮只诊断，没有改代码或 automation 配置。
- Notion pending 仍未自动消除。
- 验证器仍会在 60 天边界附近继续误报，直到修掉 cutoff 来源。

**推荐下一步**
1. 修 `validate_dws_output_structure.py`：优先读取 `reports/daily_summary.json` 的 `hot_cutoff_time`，不要用验证时刻动态计算。
2. 把 automation 时间恢复为每天 `17:00`，避免 11:00/19:00 双跑。
3. 验证命令改为从 `config/target_groups.yaml` 动态读取所有 enabled 群，不再硬编码 6 个群。

核心目标：
- 从本机自动定时运行，改为 Codex 受控运行。
- 不允许本机 launchd 或本地脚本无人值守自动跑。
- 保留 Python 脚本作为 Codex 受控执行器，但本机脚本不得自行定时触发。
- 只允许通过 Codex automation 或用户手动让 Codex 唤起脚本执行。
- 运行前必须展示本次会处理哪些群、哪些跳过、预计风险。
- 运行后必须产出中文、人类可读报告，并附机器可读 JSON。

Automation 规则：
- 新 automation 名称：`每日钉钉DWS归档`
- 运行时间：每天 17:00。
- 删除旧 automation：`钉钉 DWS Archive 每日运行检查`。
- automation 只能触发 Codex 受控流程，不直接让本地 launchd/脚本绕过 Codex 跑。
- 取消或禁用本地 launchd 每日/每周自动运行入口。
- `scripts/run_daily.sh`、`scripts/run_weekly.sh` 若保留，只能作为 Codex 受控调用入口或兼容 wrapper，不能再被本地自动调度。

群配置规则：
- `scan_mode` 只能二选一：`auto` 或 `manual_only`。
- 禁止写成 `auto/manual_only`、`auto_or_manual`、`mixed` 这类兼容状态。
- `auto`：Codex automation 被触发时可主动扫描。
- `manual_only`：不会被 automation 主动扫描，只能用户显式指定手动补扫、重建包、查历史。
- 每次运行报告必须列出 `auto` 群和 `manual_only` 群，且标明 `standing` 或 `project`。
- `2026年商务部报价群` 改为常驻群聊：
  - `group_type: standing`
  - `scan_mode: auto`
  - 不再作为项目群生命周期处理。
- 常驻群：默认长期 `auto`，不因日期自动停止。
- 项目群：必须有 `start_date`、`completed_date`、`grace_days`；完成后应转入 `manual_only`，不得长期无意义每日扫描。

当前群预期分类：
- `生产管理群`：常驻，auto
- `2026年商务部报价群`：常驻，auto
- `付款请示群`：常驻，auto
- `松滋葛洲坝小齿调整（原为调窑）[REDACTED_PHONE]`：项目，按配置决定 auto/manual_only
- `萍乡钢铁2026.6.3`：项目，按配置决定 auto/manual_only
- `湘东区萍乡钢铁20260622`：项目，按配置决定 auto/manual_only

输出与存储规则：
- 当前交付包仍为：
  `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] `DWS_Outputs.zip` 只包含热存储窗口内的数据。
- 热存储窗口：最近 60 天。
- 60 天及以上全部转入冷存储。
- 冷存储目录建议为：
  `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] 冷存储文件不进入当前 `DWS_Outputs.zip`。
- 当前 `DWS_Outputs.zip` 不是全历史包，而是近期可交付工作包。
- 冷存储包是历史文件本体归档。
- SQLite manifest 永久保留：
  - 群名
  - 消息 ID
  - 消息时间
  - 文件名
  - hash
  - size
  - resource_id 脱敏/内部记录
  - 原本地路径
  - 冷存储 zip 路径
  - 冷存储包内路径
  - storage_tier: hot/cold
- 本机 `data/archive/` 只保留最近 60 天文件本体。
- 60 天及以上文件迁入 OneDrive 冷存储并验证后，本机删除文件本体，但不删除 manifest 记录。
- `~/Downloads/DWS_Outputs/` 只是临时构建输出；OneDrive 当前包验证通过后删除。
- 不删除：
  - `data/all_files_manifest.sqlite3`
  - manifest 历史记录
  - reports 必要质量证据
  - Notion 同步状态
  - 冷存储包

清理规则：
- `data/staging/` 超过 24 小时的临时文件/目录可以安全清理。
- 清理 staging 前必须确认没有正在运行的 DWS 归档进程。
- `logs/` 本机只保存 15 天。
- 15 天以上日志先写中文摘要到 Notion，再删除本机旧日志。
- 日志摘要不得包含 token、open_conversation_id、完整 resource_id、cookie、账号敏感信息。
- `reports/` 保留必要质量证据，但避免无限增长；旧报告可摘要入 Notion 后轮转。

失败资源 backoff：
- 每个资源最多主动尝试 3 次。
- 超过 3 次后标记为 exhausted。
- exhausted 资源不再每日主动重试。
- exhausted 资源仍必须出现在 missing/manifest/status 中。
- 允许用户手动触发补扫 exhausted 资源。
- 失败记录必须保存：
  - attempt_count
  - first_failed_at
  - last_failed_at
  - attempted_methods
  - DWS error code / error summary
  - next_action
  - exhausted true/false

per-group cursor：
- 每个群维护独立 cursor。
- 成功扫描完成后记录：
  - group_name
  - last_success_run_id
  - last_success_cursor_time
  - last_message_time_seen
  - hasMore=false 完成边界
  - DWS version
- 下一次 `auto` 扫描从该群 cursor 之后开始。
- 不再每日从 `[REDACTED_PHONE]` 或 start_date 做全量扫描。
- 允许手动 full reconciliation，但不作为每日默认行为。
- cursor 更新必须 fail closed：只有本轮扫描成功到完成边界后才更新。

运行报告规则：
报告必须中文、人类可读为主，机器 JSON 只放附录。不要只输出机器指标。

报告结构建议：
1. 本次结论
   - 完成 / 部分完成 / 失败
   - 是否生成 OneDrive 当前包
   - 是否删除 Downloads 临时输出
   - 是否有冷存储迁移
   - 是否有资源超过 3 次失败

2. 本次运行方式
   - `Codex automation` 或 `Codex 手动唤起`
   - automation 名称
   - 运行时间
   - run_id
   - DWS version

3. 本次处理群聊清单
   中文表格：
   - 群名
   - 类型：常驻/项目
   - scan_mode：auto/manual_only
   - 本次动作：主动扫描/跳过/手动指定
   - cursor 起点
   - cursor 终点
   - 说明

4. 下载结果
   中文表格：
   - 群名
   - 新下载
   - 复用
   - 失败
   - 超过 3 次不再重试
   - missing 数量
   - 是否需要人工处理

5. 存储结果
   中文表格：
   - 当前热存储窗口：最近 60 天
   - 冷存储范围：60 天及以上
   - 当前 DWS_Outputs.zip 大小
   - DWS_Archive 冷存储新增大小
   - 本机 data/archive 前后大小
   - staging 清理大小
   - Downloads 临时输出是否已删除

6. 风险与阻塞
   - DWS 超时
   - OneDrive 空间不足
   - Notion 同步失败
   - cursor 未更新
   - 某群配置不完整
   - 某项目群应转 manual_only

7. 推荐下一步
   - 用户需要确认什么
   - 下次是否需要手动补扫
   - 是否需要处理 exhausted 资源

8. 机器可读附录
   - JSON summary
   - 不作为主报告主体

Notion 规则：
- skill/config 变化后必须同步 Notion。
- 有 token 用 API。
- 没 token 用 Notion connector。
- connector 不可用再尝试 Chrome/computer-use。
- 都失败则写 pending，并在最终报告中明确 pending 路径。
- Notion 中记录中文摘要和关键指标，不写敏感 ID。
- 15 天以上日志摘要写入 Notion 后，本机日志可删除。

验证规则：

  - `python3 -m py_compile`

- 报告检查：

## Restore outline

1. Install DWS and login to the China DingTalk organization.
2. Run `dws skill setup --mode mono --target all --yes`.
3. Restore or recreate this archive project, then copy the tracked project files listed below.
4. Re-resolve target group IDs with `dws chat search --query "群名" --limit 10 --cursor 0 --format json`.
5. Fill `config/target_groups.yaml`, then run `/usr/bin/python3 scripts/archive_dingtalk_all_files.py --plan-only` from Codex to review the preflight list.
6. After the preflight is accepted, run `DWS_CODEX_CONTROLLED=1 DWS_RUN_SOURCE=codex_manual /bin/sh scripts/run_daily.sh` from Codex.

## Restore outline

1. Install DWS and login to the China DingTalk organization.
2. Run `dws skill setup --mode mono --target all --yes`.
3. Restore or recreate this archive project, then copy the tracked project files listed below.
4. Re-resolve target group IDs with `dws chat search --query "群名" --limit 10 --cursor 0 --format json`.
5. Fill `config/target_groups.yaml`, then run `/usr/bin/python3 scripts/archive_dingtalk_all_files.py --probe`.
6. After probe succeeds, run `sh scripts/run_daily.sh`.

统一工作区规则：本 automation 与考勤检查、钉钉工作检查、KMFA资金周报日报自动化使用同一组 Codex cwds（干净显示入口）：
- DWS 归档 alias：`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] -> 真实目录 `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] KMFA/CodexProject alias：`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] -> 真实目录 `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] automation 的实际执行目录必须是 DWS 归档 alias 或其真实目录；只把 KMFA alias 作为下游联动可见工作区，不得在 KMFA repo 里误跑 DWS 归档命令。若发现这些上游/下游 automation 的 cwds 不一致，先修正 automation 配置并报告。

硬性边界：这是 Codex 受控流程；不得启用或依赖本机 launchd；不得绕过 Codex 直接让本地脚本无人值守运行；不得读取或输出完整 open_conversation_id、token、cookie、账号敏感信息；不得访问浏览器 Cookie、Keychain、钉钉 live DB 或私有 API。

固定运行目录：优先在 `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] 运行；如 alias 异常，才使用真实目录 `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] shell 不在该目录，先切换到该目录并在最终报告中标明；不得在 KMFA repo 或其他仓库误跑。

长跨度与完整性规则：常驻群和部分项目群天然可能有很长时间跨度，这不是异常。全时、全盘、全量、深度完整收集是硬要求；不得为了缩短 automation 运行时间而截断页数、缩短时间窗、跳过历史资源、只扫最近消息或抽样。长跨度扫描依靠每群 cursor、`reports/current_run_heartbeat.json` 和日志判断进度；只要 heartbeat、日志、DWS 子进程或输出文件仍在推进，就不要判定失败。只有无 heartbeat、无日志增长、无 DWS 子进程进展且超过配置的 stale 阈值，才报告阻塞。

DWS 网络韧性：运行前读取 `config/target_groups.yaml` 的 `dws_http_timeout_seconds`、`dws_command_retries`、`dws_retry_backoff_seconds`。脚本会给 DWS CLI 传 `--timeout` 并对 `io_timeout`、`request_timeout`、`dial tcp`、`context deadline` 等瞬态错误有限重试。若仍失败，先运行 `dws doctor --format json` 和必要的 `dws cache refresh`，报告网络/服务状态；不要把一次 DWS 网络超时误判为配置损坏或群缺失。

项目群自动完工规则：`config/target_groups.yaml` 中 `group_type: project` 的群，在本轮成功增量扫描到 `hasMore=false` 后，如果本轮无新增消息、无新增文件信号，且距 SQLite `group_cursors.last_message_time_seen` 已满 `project_auto_complete_idle_days`（当前 7 天），脚本会自动把该项目群写回为 `scan_mode: manual_only`，并把最后一次有消息的时间记录为 `completed_at`/`completed_date`/`last_active_message_time`。自动完工后的项目群不再被 automation 主动扫描，但用户显式指定时仍可补扫、重建包或查历史。报告必须列出本次是否有项目群自动完工。

目标变更规则：每次在主线程增删改 `config/target_groups.yaml` 的目标群、群名、scan_mode、group_type、start_date/completed_date、DWS timeout/retry 参数或项目群自动完工字段后，必须同步检查并更新本 automation；同时检查考勤检查、钉钉工作检查、KMFA资金周报日报自动化是否仍使用同一组 cwds。automation 的验收不得硬编码旧群清单，必须从当前 `config/target_groups.yaml` 动态读取所有 enabled 群。

执行步骤：
1. 确认当前 shell 在 DWS 归档 alias 或真实项目目录；检查是否已有 DWS 归档进程正在运行。如有，读取 heartbeat、日志和子进程状态；若仍在推进，等待，不中断。
2. 运行 `dws doctor --format json` 记录登录、网络、缓存状态；如 doctor 失败，只报告阻塞，不跑归档。
3. 先运行预检并展示本次会处理哪些群、哪些跳过、cursor 起点和预计风险：`/usr/bin/python3 scripts/archive_dingtalk_all_files.py --plan-only --run-source codex_automation --automation-name "每日钉钉DWS归档"`。
4. 运行 Codex 受控入口：`DWS_CODEX_CONTROLLED=1 DWS_RUN_SOURCE=codex_automation DWS_AUTOMATION_NAME="每日钉钉DWS归档" /bin/sh scripts/run_daily.sh`。
5. 运行动态输出验证：`/usr/bin/python3 scripts/validate_dws_output_structure.py --config config/target_groups.yaml --mirror '[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]' --expect-downloads-deleted --hot-days 60 --summary-json reports/daily_summary.json --cold-root '[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]'`。验证器必须使用本次 `reports/daily_summary.json` 的 `hot_cutoff_time`，不要用验证时刻误判热/冷边界。
6. 读取 `reports/daily_report.md`、`reports/daily_summary.json`、`reports/status.md`、`reports/current_run_heartbeat.json` 摘要，重点确认所有 enabled 群 cursor、项目群自动完工结果、exhausted/missing、OneDrive 当前包和 Downloads 临时输出删除状态。
7. 尽力同步 Notion：先运行 `scripts/sync_notion_skill_backup.py --quiet`；若 shell 缺 token 或返回 fallback_required，必须使用可用 Notion connector 同步到 Notion 管理页并回写 `--record-external-sync`。只有 connector/browser fallback 也失败时，才允许保留 pending，并必须在报告中明确 pending 文件路径。
8. Sidebar 收尾：最终报告准备好后，作为最后一个 tool action，使用 Codex app 的 `set_thread_archived`（如需先用 `tool_search` 发现该工具）将当前 automation-run 线程归档；调用时不要传 `threadId`，只归档当前运行线程，避免它重复显示在 sidebar chat。不要归档普通用户交接线程。

输出中文报告，必须包含：进度百分比、已完成、未完成、关键证据、风险/阻塞、推荐下一步。报告里要明确 OneDrive 当前包是否生成、Downloads 临时输出是否已删除、是否有冷存储迁移、所有 enabled 群及对应 cursor 是否更新、heartbeat 最后更新时间、是否有 exhausted 资源、是否有项目群因 7 天无新增自动转 manual_only、DWS doctor/timeout/retry 证据、Notion 同步是 API/connector/pending 哪一种。"}

Schedule contract: one automation only, with two Beijing trigger windows: 11:35 -> morning_1135 and 17:05 -> evening_1705. Do not create one automation per rule. The saved Codex scheduler must not create Cartesian-product extra runs such as 11:05 or 17:35 Beijing time.

3. Set `TZ=Asia/Shanghai`.
4. Determine current Beijing trigger window: if the run is near 11:35 use `morning_1135`; if near 17:05 use `evening_1705`. If current Beijing time is not near either window, fail closed and report observed `run_at_beijing` plus the scheduler mismatch.
5. Run `python3 KMFA/tools/daily_routine_check/healthcheck.py --config-only` and read `source_readiness_status`, `zip_input_ready`, and `next_enable_conditions`.
6. Primary input is `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] if unavailable, also check `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] as the local OneDrive mirror of the same upstream package. If healthcheck reports `ZIP_INPUT_UNREADABLE`, report that this OneDrive zip must be hydrated or replaced with a readable zip; do not unzip large packages into local scratch. If healthcheck reports `SOURCE_MISSING`, report missing zip members or fallback direct-folder paths.
7. Run `python3 KMFA/daily_routine_check_skill/tools/validate_skill_package.py`.
8. Run `python3 -m unittest KMFA.tests.test_daily_routine_check -q`.
9. Execute exactly one routine check command for the current windo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]   - 11:35: `python3 -m KMFA.tools.daily_routine_check.main --date today --timezone Asia/Shanghai --trigger-window morning_1135 --send --cleanup --apply`
   - 17:05: `python3 -m KMFA.tools.daily_routine_check.main --date today --timezone Asia/Shanghai --trigger-window evening_1705 --send --cleanup --apply`
10. Verify output contains `run_at_beijing`, `check_date`, `trigger_window`, `rules_evaluated`, `rules_skipped`, `rules_blocked_by_source`, `input_mode`, and `notification_delivery_status`.
11. If a group has `SOURCE_MISSING` or `SOURCE_STALE`, treat that group as source-blocked: preserve the source-quality event, list blocked rule IDs in `rules_blocked_by_source`, and do not turn the source problem into routine `MISSING` or `CASH_NO_DATA` false positives.
12. For `morning_1135`, verify `cash_risk_result` when payment source is fresh; DWS text extraction uses configured markers first, and image/file-only cash candidates without structured amount must become `CASH_NEEDS_REVIEW` unless private OCR is explicitly configured.
13. If notification config is missing, report `CONFIG_MISSING`; do not pretend a DingTalk message was sent.
14. Cleanup may only run through `--cleanup --apply`, which performs SQLite WAL checkpoint/VACUUM and writes `cleanup_events`; never delete DWS input.
15. Do not modify upstream DWS archive outputs.
16. If this run changes any skill, automation prompt, metadata, code, or tests, validate, commit, push to GitHub `main`, and verify `HEAD == origin/main` before reporting completion.
17. Sidebar 收尾：最终报告准备好后，作为最后一个 tool action，使用 Codex app 的 `set_thread_archived`（如需先用 `tool_search` 发现该工具）将当前 automation-run 线程归档；调用时不要传 `threadId`，只归档当前运行线程，避免它重复显示在 sidebar chat。不要归档普通用户交接线程。

Hard boundarie[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] Do not commit secrets, `.env.local`, webhook URLs, signing keys, app secrets, token values, resolved DWS IDs, SQLite/WAL/SHM, raw JSON/JSONL/GZ, raw OCR bodies, raw screenshots, DWS output archives, robot response bodies, or OneDrive private archives.
- Do not create branches, PRs, issues, or worktrees.
- Keep active SQLite local-private and ignored; durable JSONL logs and snapshots belong in OneDrive.

Final response forma[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] passed|warning|failed

trigger_window: morning_1135|evening_1705

Reference only: 11:00 Australia/Sydney equals 09:00 Asia/Shanghai during the current UTC+10 offset.

统一工作区规则：本 automation 与上游每日钉钉DWS归档、考勤检查、钉钉工作检查使用同一组 Codex cwds（干净显示入口）：

4. If readiness is `SOURCE_MISSING` only because the legacy direct folder is absent, inspect the readiness report source candidates. If a DWS_Outputs.zip candidate is `READY`, materialize the 付款请示群 source explicitly and then rerun readines[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]   `python3 KMFA/fund-weekly-analysis-skill/tools/materialize_fund_source.py --source-zip [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] --zip-prefix 付款请示群 --target-dir [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] --repo-root [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] --timezone Australia/Sydney --apply`

5. Continue to extraction only if readiness is `READY` after the initial check or after explicit materialization; otherwise fail closed with the readiness report and include which upstream DWS zip/fallback path was checked.
6. Do not use simulated/test/fake/estimated financial data.
7. Build evidence index first, then fund ledger, then internal transfer netting, then balance continuity, then tax/loan risk, then company-bank matrix, then Excel.

13. Mirror any prompt/skill/template/governance changes under `KMFA/fund-weekly-analysis-skill/automation/` or relevant tracked folders, validate, commit and push to GitHub main if and only if validation passes.

统一工作区规则：本 automation 与上游每日钉钉DWS归档、考勤检查、钉钉工作检查、KMFA资金周报日报自动化使用同一组 Codex cwds（干净显示入口）：
- DWS 归档 alias：`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] -> 真实目录 `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] KMFA/CodexProject alias：`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] -> 真实目录 `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] automation 的实际执行目录必须是 DWS 归档 alias 或其真实目录；只把 KMFA alias 作为下游联动可见工作区。若发现这些上游/下游 automation 的 cwds 不一致，先修正 automation 配置并报告。

硬性边界：不得启用或依赖本机 launchd；不得绕过 Codex 直接让本地脚本无人值守运行；不得生成每群 latest.zip；不得在冷存储生成 zip 或年份目录；不得读取或输出完整 open_conversation_id、token、cookie、账号敏感信息；不得访问浏览器 Cookie、Keychain、钉钉 live DB 或私有 API；不得自动升级 DWS。

固定运行目录：优先在 `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] 运行；如 alias 异常，才使用真实目录 `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] automation 配置时要确认 `上游每日钉钉DWS归档`、考勤检查、钉钉工作检查、KMFA资金周报日报自动化的 cwds 都使用同一组 alias 路径。

长跨度规则：常驻群和长项目群的历史跨度长是正常现象，不得把长运行本身视为失败。维护检查应读取 `reports/current_run_heartbeat.json`、日志和 SQLite cursor 来判断进展；只有超过配置 stale 阈值且无 heartbeat/日志/子进程进展时才报告阻塞。

DWS 网络韧性复核：确认 `config/target_groups.yaml` 存在 `dws_http_timeout_seconds=120`、`dws_command_retries=3`、`dws_retry_backoff_seconds=5` 或用户最新配置；确认脚本 DWS CLI 调用会传 `--timeout` 并重试 `io_timeout`、`request_timeout`、`dial tcp`、`context deadline` 等瞬态错误。运行 `dws doctor --format json`，允许版本更新 warning，但网络/登录/cache fail 必须报告为阻塞。

项目群自动完工复核：确认 `project_auto_complete_idle_days` 当前为 7。项目群在成功增量扫描到 `hasMore=false` 后，如本轮无新增消息、无新增文件信号，且距 SQLite `group_cursors.last_message_time_seen` 已满 7 天，应自动写回 `scan_mode: manual_only`，并记录 `completed_at`/`completed_date`/`last_active_message_time` 为最后一次有消息的时间。复核时要列出 auto 项目群、manual_only 项目群、最近消息时间和是否存在应转未转的风险；只报告风险，不擅自跑每日归档。

目标变更规则：每次增删改 `config/target_groups.yaml`、DWS timeout/retry 参数或项目群自动完工字段后必须同步检查本 automation。验收必须从当前 config 动态读取所有 enabled 群，不能硬编码旧群列表。

检查项：
1. 确认当前 shell 在 DWS 归档 alias 或真实项目目录。
2. 读取 `README.md`、`config/target_groups.yaml`、`reports/status.md`、`reports/daily_report.md`、`reports/missing_media.csv`、`reports/current_run_heartbeat.json` 摘要；敏感 ID 必须脱敏。
3. 运行 `launchctl list | rg 'dingtalk-dws-archive' || true`，确认 daily/weekly launchd label 未加载。
4. 运行 `DWS_CODEX_CONTROLLED=1 /bin/sh scripts/run_weekly.sh`；如失败，只报告失败原因，不自动升级。
5. 运行动态输出结构验证：`/usr/bin/python3 scripts/validate_dws_output_structure.py --config config/target_groups.yaml --mirror '[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]' --expect-downloads-deleted --hot-days 60 --summary-json reports/daily_summary.json --cold-root '[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]'`。
6. 检查 `[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] 只包含热窗口数据，`[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH] 冷存储按 `<群名>/files/MM/<文件>` 保存，根下没有年份目录，没有 zip；`~/Downloads/DWS_Outputs/` 不存在，每群无 `<群名>_latest.zip`。
7. 汇总 SQLite `data/all_files_manifest.sqlite3`：hot/cold 计数、cursor 边界、项目群 auto/manual_only 状态、最近消息时间、missing/exhausted 计数；不要输出敏感 ID。
8. 尽力同步 Notion；shell 无 token 时必须使用可用 Notion connector，只有 connector/browser fallback 也失败时才报告 pending。
9. Sidebar 收尾：最终报告准备好后，作为最后一个 tool action，使用 Codex app 的 `set_thread_archived`（如需先用 `tool_search` 发现该工具）将当前 automation-run 线程归档；调用时不要传 `threadId`，只归档当前运行线程，避免它重复显示在 sidebar chat。不要归档普通用户交接线程。

输出简洁中文报告：进度百分比、已完成、未完成、关键证据、风险/阻塞、推荐下一步。发现失败时只报告，不自动修复。"}

3. 先运行预检并展示本次会处理哪些群、哪些跳过、cursor 起点和预计风险：`/usr/bin/python3 scripts/archive_dingtalk_all_files.py --plan-only --run-source codex_automation --automation-name "每日钉钉DWS归档"`。
4. 运行 Codex 受控入口：`DWS_CODEX_CONTROLLED=1 DWS_RUN_SOURCE=codex_automation DWS_AUTOMATION_NAME="每日钉钉DWS归档" /bin/sh scripts/run_daily.sh`。

6. 读取 `reports/daily_report.md`、`reports/daily_summary.json`、`reports/status.md`、`reports/current_run_heartbeat.json` 摘要，重点确认所有 enabled 群 cursor、项目群自动完工结果、exhausted/missing、OneDrive 当前包和 Downloads 临时输出删除状态。
7. 尽力同步 Notion：先运行 `scripts/sync_notion_skill_backup.py --quiet`；若 shell 缺 token 或返回 fal…43 tokens truncated…许保留 pending，并必须在报告中明确 pending 文件路径。
8. Sidebar 收尾：最终报告准备好后，作为最后一个 tool action，使用 Codex app 的 `set_thread_archived`（如需先用 `tool_search` 发现该工具）将当前 automation-run 线程归档；调用时不要传 `threadId`，只归档当前运行线程，避免它重复显示在 sidebar chat。不要归档普通用户交接线程。

长跨度与完整性规则：常驻群和部分项目群天然可能有很长时间跨度，这不是异常。全时、全盘、全量、深度完整收集是硬要求；不得为了缩短 automation 运行时间而截断页数、缩短时间窗、跳过历史资源、只扫最近消息或抽样。长跨度扫描依靠每群 cursor、`reports/current_run_heartbeat.json` 和日志判断进度；只要 heartbeat、日志、DWS 子进程或输出文件仍在推进，就不要判定失败。只有无 heartbeat、无日志增长、无 DWS 子进程进展且超过配置的 stale 阈值，才报告阻塞。

项目群自动完工规则：`config/target_groups.yaml` 中 `group_type: project` 的群，在本轮成功增量扫描到 `hasMore=false` 后，如果本轮无新增消息、无新增文件信号，且距 SQLite `group_cursors.last_message_time_seen` 已满 `project_auto_complete_idle_days`（当前 7 天），脚本会自动把该项目群写回为 `scan_mode: manual_only`，并把最后一次有消息的时间记录为 `completed_at`/`completed_date`/`last_active_message_time`。自动完工后的项目群不再被 automation 主动扫描，但用户显式指定时仍可补扫、重建包或查历史。报告必须列出本次是否有项目群自动完工。

目标变更规则：每次在主线程增删改 `config/target_groups.yaml` 的目标群、群名、scan_mode、group_type、start_date/completed_date、输出结构规则或项目群自动完工字段后，必须同步检查并更新本 automation。automation 的验收不得硬编码旧群清单，必须从当前 `config/target_groups.yaml` 动态读取所有 enabled 群。
